summary: Completed testing of MANO Iteration 9 features: Banking supported banks (11 banks including N26, Imagin, Nickel), Admin panel new tabs (Suscripciones, Base de Datos), Admin login, Admin subscriptions endpoint, Admin user plan update endpoint. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Admin panel loads correctly with all 9 tabs.
passed_tests: GET /api/banking/supported-banks - Includes N26, Imagin, Nickel (new banks)
GET /api/banking/supported-banks - Includes all 8 original Spanish banks
POST /api/auth/login - Admin login with admin@mano.com / Admin123! works
PATCH /api/admin/users/{user_id}/plan - All valid plans work (free, personal, family, business, enterprise)
GET /api/admin/dashboard - Returns stats (total_users, premium_users, pending_investors, approved_investors)
Frontend: Admin panel loads at /admin with 9 tabs
Frontend: Suscripciones tab shows premium subscribers and manual plan management
Frontend: Base de Datos tab shows MongoDB connection info and collections
critical_code_review_comments: Banking service correctly includes 11 banks (8 original + N26, Imagin, Nickel) in /app/backend/services/banking_service.py line 20-24
Admin subscriptions endpoint properly returns premium users with stats at /api/admin/subscriptions
Admin user plan update endpoint correctly validates plans and logs changes at /api/admin/users/{user_id}/plan
AdminPanel.js correctly implements 9 tabs including new Suscripciones and Base de Datos tabs
All admin endpoints properly require admin role authentication
seed_data_creation: Test users created during plan update testing, reverted to free plan after tests

mocked_apis.banking_service: Banking integration is SIMULATED - does not connect to real banks (Open Banking). Accounts and transactions are generated for demo purposes.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features fully tested: Banking endpoint returns 11 banks (Santander, BBVA, CaixaBank, Sabadell, Bankinter, ING, Unicaja, Kutxabank, N26, Imagin, Nickel). Admin panel has 9 tabs: Inversores, Usuarios, Suscripciones (NEW), Pagos, Descargas, Tiempo Real, WhatsApp, API Keys, Base de Datos (NEW). Admin credentials: admin@mano.com / Admin123!. Plan update endpoint supports: free, personal, family, business, enterprise.
